title: Client Engagement Skills
tagline: Master customer-facing engineering from first meeting to expert FDE
description: A complete path through Client Engagement Skills for Forward Deployed Engineers: foundations of client-facing engineering and the FDE role, trust and relationship building, discovery and problem framing, stakeholder navigation, client communication and facilitation, engagement planning and delivery management, expectation and risk management, solution design in client contexts, hands-on implementation at customer sites, enablement and knowledge transfer, pre-sales and commercial awareness, advanced engagement patterns across industries, and expert-level FDE leadership. Technical engineering content (languages, cloud, AI/ML, system design) lives in dedicated subjects.
